content:
type: STATUS
files: src/datasets/features/features.py
summary: Heads up - my workspace copy of features.py doesn't show your keep_features_dicts_synced decorator (still just 'def update' with no decorator here), so we're likely in separate isolated sandboxes rather than a shared filesystem. I'll keep my update() self-contained (deep-merge + manual _column_requires_decoding resync per key) so my patch.txt is correct standalone, since each agent's patch is evaluated independently. No action needed on your end.
